capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复把清算区当作价格主导变量。2025-09-22 直说“Liquidations lead the way, always... it's the ultimate form of liquidity profitability”；2025-09-24 提到“$116.5k is gathering some short liquidations... time to hit short liquidations soon”；多张图都直接标注 LP、liquidity run、range highs/lows 的止损池。

他的核心框架就是先扫流动性再走真实方向。2025-03-29 说“usual market manipulation targetting stop losses”；2026-02-04 说“the first part of this new projection: the liquidity sweep of the previous low”；图1、图2都先画上破局部阻力做 liquidity run，再回落扫 local low。

他极度依赖 1W50EMA/1D50EMA 作为趋势延续锚点。2025-02-27 只愿意在“$77k-$78k: CME gap + 1W50EMA”做多；2025-05-18 说“we've simply retested the 1W50EMA, the main bull market support level”；图3、图4、图7都把 1W50EMA 画成 bull market support/buy zone。

他经常先定义区间，再只做区间边缘与假突破。2025-08-24 明说“Price is clearly ranging between $112k & $120k”；2026-04-05 说“I'm only looking to trade the extremes of this range”；图1、图2把 RANGE、mid-range、local support、local resistance 作为完整交易框架。
他的具体执行往往是区间上下沿反手。2025-09-22 说“Retraced done to range lows... added some swing longs again”；2025-02-25 说不在 range lows 直接接，而等更高胜率位置；图2在 range 中先扫上方流动性，再预期跌向 local support/local low。

他大量使用 R/S flip 与 reclaim 逻辑。2024-09-23 说“Bitcoin needs to find acceptance above the previous high ... a resistance/support flip”；2025-06-01 说“R/S flip failed”；2025-05-26 说“previous resistance - now turning into support. A promising R/S flip”；图3、图4顶部也写着“Main resistance: R/S flip and we're good”。

虽然他更常说 imbalance / wick / CME gap，但本质上是在交易不平衡回补。2025-10-27 说在“we filled the CME gap at $107k”后满仓；2024-12-26 说自己的指标“marks the imbalances for me, like wicks and LPs”；图8写着“Take upside imbalances from liquidation cascade”“CME gap filled!”。
均线收复是他确认趋势切换的重要条件。2024-08-24 说“$BTC broke through the daily 50EMA and pushed higher. My idea was invalidated”；2025-02-27 的做多条件 b) 是“Price reclaims $87...” 这类 reclaim 逻辑通常配合均线与关键位。
他明显会围绕 FOMC 降风险。2025-01-26 说“Important week ahead... first FOMC”；2024-04-28 说“FOMC and NFP next week - big week ahead”；图6直接在时间轴画出 FOMC 事件线，表达事件前后要重新评估结构。
他多次强调不要在瀑布里抢反弹。2025-02-24 说“without knife catching”；2024-09-30 说“Support sliced like butter so I'm not engaging in longs atm”；2026-02-04 说“Longing this is risky”；2025-02-25 在第一次做多失败后立刻认错并停止接刀。
他对失效 setup 会快速止损。2025-02-25 说“I tried longing the first zone but had to quickly close it at a small loss”；2025-01-27 公开承认“the idea was wrong”；图3直接写“stop-losses are below”，说明预先定义失效点。

长影线/拒绝是他最常见的确认信号之一。2025-07-20 说“Wicks to the upside but price not progressing any further”；2026-02-22 说“Price tends to fill the 100% of the wick after revisiting the 50% level”；图1标“Long wick”，图5圈出顶部连续上影。
他不是纯均值回归，也会在明确趋势中持有偏多结构。2025-07-20 开头就是“quiet week during this strong uptrend”；2025-05-21 说“More to come... at least $115k”；图5是在 1D50EMA 上方顺势观察顶部放缓而不是立即做空。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Multi-timeframe Wick Fill Strategy
new_capabilities_proposed.description: When a large wick is left on 4H/1D/1W, price tends to revisit and partially or fully fill the wick, often first to 50% and later to 100%. The fill level becomes a directional magnet and timing tool.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当 4H/1D/1W 出现明显长影线时，价格倾向回补该影线，常先回到 50%，再看是否走向 100%。影线回补位被他当作方向磁铁与择时工具。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-02-22 说“Price tends to fill the 100% of the wick after revisiting the 50% level”；2026-03-16 说“The wick fill strategy is my favorite trading strategy!”；图8写“>50% wick has already been filled”，图1/2/5/7都有影线回补思维。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Weekly 50EMA Bull/Bear Pivot
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use the 1W 50EMA as the primary bull-market support / bear-market resistance. Reactions at this level define whether to swing long, de-risk, or wait for reclaim.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 将 1W50EMA 作为最核心的牛市支撑/熊市阻力。价格对该均线的反应决定是否做波段多、减仓，或等待收复确认。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2025-02-28 直接说“1W50EMA is historically the best $BTC bull/bear market support & resistance indicator level”；图3、图4、图7都把 1W50EMA 写成 Bull Market Support / buy zone。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Liquidity Run Then Reversal Projection
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 先扫流动性再反转路径投影
new_capabilities_proposed.description: In a defined range or local structure, project price to first run one side's stop-loss/liquidation pool, reject, and then travel toward the opposite pool. This is used as a forward path map rather than a static setup.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 在明确区间或局部结构中，先预判价格会去扫某一侧止损/清算池，随后被拒绝，再朝另一侧流动性池移动。这更像路径投影，而不是单点形态。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-01-30 说“projection 100% completed... projecting this 1 month in advance”；图1、图2都画出先上扫 local resistance/liquidity run，再跌向 local support/local low 的完整白线路径。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Market Manipulation Psychology Framework
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Interpret price action by asking where the majority are trapped, where stop losses sit, and how market makers can maximize forced liquidations before the real move.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 用“多数人会被困在哪里、止损堆在哪里、做市商如何先最大化强平再走真实方向”的思维解释价格行为。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 2026-01-29 说“99% of traders use the same conventional trading systems”；2024-05-20 说“trying to think like the MM so we can jump on their trades”；2025-03-29 说“usual market manipulation targetting stop losses”。

personal_quirks.quote: Liquidations lead the way, always... it's the ultimate form of liquidity profitability for the hands that control this market.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先找清算与止损堆，再推演价格路径；价格不是随机走，而是先去最赚钱的流动性口袋。

personal_quirks.quote: The wick fill strategy is my favorite trading strategy!
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 长影线不是噪音，而是后续高概率回补目标；影线本身就是 setup。

personal_quirks.quote: Longing this is risky, we all agree. It requires screen time, risk management and confidence.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 逆势抄底必须附带更高门槛：盯盘、风控、仓位控制，不能机械执行。

personal_quirks.quote: Support sliced like butter so I'm not engaging in longs atm.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 关键支撑若被无反应击穿，不做主观抄底，等下一层流动性或重新收复。

personal_quirks.quote: I tried longing the first zone but had to quickly close it at a small loss.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: setup 失效就快速小亏离场，错了立刻认，不让观点变成包袱。

unique_traits: 他和常规 TA 交易员最大的区别，是把“流动性/清算/止损分布”放在 K 线形态之前，用做市商会先扫哪里来组织整个分析。其次，他有很强的路径投影能力，不只是给方向，而是给出先扫哪边、再回补哪段影线、最后去哪个区间边界的动态剧本。最后，1W50EMA、CME gap、影线回补这些工具在他手里不是独立指标，而是围绕“市场操纵与流动性收割”整合成一套执行框架。

high_conviction_phrases: there should be a very strong reaction
only game on once it can reclaim
low_conviction_phrases: it might take a bit more time
